description:
## What

The killer feature. Point at any library and get a comprehensive, shareable health report. This is the run Lighthouse, get a report moment for web components.

## Deliverables

1. **Audit page** (apps/admin/src/app/audit/[id]/page.tsx):
   - Runs ALL available analyses against a single library: health scoring, accessibility profile, CEM validation, bundle size estimation, breaking change detection
   - Single-page report card with: overall grade (A-F), score, dimension breakdown with pass or fail, top 5 critical issues with fix recommendations, component-by-component mini-grades, scoring tier badge
   - Run Audit button triggers all scoring in parallel

2. **Audit API route** (apps/admin/src/app/api/audit/[id]/route.ts):
   - Orchestrates the full audit: health scorer (local) or wc-tools score_all_components (CDN), analyze_accessibility, validate_cem per component, estimate_bundle_size
   - Aggregates into unified AuditReport type

3. **audit-report.ts** (apps/admin/src/lib):
   - AuditReport type with fields: libraryId, libraryName, scoringTier, overallScore, overallGrade, timestamp, health breakdown, accessibility breakdown, CEM quality, bundle size data, critical issues with fix recommendations, component grades array
   - Report generation and aggregation logic

4. **Export and Share:** Copy Report Link and Download as JSON buttons. Report is a static snapshot.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Audit completes in under 30s for local library, under 60s for CDN library
- Report renders as single-page view with all sections
- JSON export contains full AuditReport and can be re-imported
- Works for both local and CDN libraries
- Graceful degradation when individual tools fail (show partial results, not blank page)
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
title: M5: One-Shot Audit & Shareable Report Card
